
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>California State Roleplay</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Oswald:wght@700;800&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --green: #3adf6a;
    --green-dark: #22a048;
    --green-glow: rgba(58,223,106,0.45);
  }
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { font-family:"Inter",sans-serif; background:#091209; color:#fff; overflow-x:hidden; }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  .nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 16px; left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: min(520px, 92vw);
    background: rgba(9,18,9,0.85);
    border: 1px solid rgba(58,223,106,0.2);
    border-radius: 50px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 10px 10px 10px 22px;
    z-index: 999;
    backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;
    font-weight:800; font-size:16px; letter-spacing:1px;
    color:#fff; text-decoration:none; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
  }
  .nav-logo svg { width:18px; height:18px; fill:var(--green); }
  .nav-btn {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-dark), var(--green));
    color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:50px;
    padding:10px 22px; font-size:13px; font-weight:700;
    font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif; letter-spacing:1.2px;
    text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:7px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 16px var(--green-glow);
    transition:transform .2s, box-shadow .2s;
    text-decoration:none;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(58,223,106,0.55); }
  .nav-btn svg { width:16px; height:16px; fill:#fff; }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    position:relative; min-height:100vh;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    text-align:center; overflow:hidden; padding:80px 20px 180px;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 70% at 50% 35%, rgba(34,160,72,0.25) 0%, transparent 65%),
      linear-gradient(180deg,#091209 0%,#0d1a0d 50%,#091209 100%);
  }
  .hero-bg::before {
    content:""; position:absolute; inset:0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(58,223,106,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(58,223,106,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size:55px 55px;
    animation:gridMove 25s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes gridMove { from{transform:translateY(0)} to{transform:translateY(55px)} }

  .hero-logo-bg {
    position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%;
    transform:translate(-50%,-48%);
    width:min(750px,88vw); pointer-events:none; z-index:1;
  }
  .hero-logo-bg img { width:100%; display:block; }

  .particles { position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; z-index:1; }
  .particle {
    position:absolute; border-radius:50%; opacity:0; background:var(--green);
    animation:floatUp var(--dur,6s) var(--delay,0s) infinite ease-in-out;
  }
  @keyframes floatUp {
    0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(100vh) scale(0)}
    10%{opacity:.5} 90%{opacity:.15}
    100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10vh) scale(1)}
  }

  /* Palms */
  .palm-wrap { position:absolute; bottom:0; z-index:3; pointer-events:none; }
  .palm-wrap.left  { left:-15px; }
  .palm-wrap.right { right:-15px; }
  .palm-wrap img   { width:300px; height:auto; display:block; }

  /* Hero content */
  .hero-content {
    position:relative; z-index:4;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;
    animation:fadeUp .9s ease both;
  }
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}
    to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
  }

  .hero-title-line1 {
    font-family:"Oswald",sans-serif;
    font-size:clamp(64px,11vw,128px); font-weight:800; line-height:.95;
    color:#fff; letter-spacing:-1px;
    text-shadow:0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
    animation:fadeUp .9s .1s ease both;
  }
  .hero-title-line2 {
    font-family:"Oswald",sans-serif;
    font-size:clamp(64px,11vw,128px); font-weight:800; line-height:.95;
    color:var(--green); letter-spacing:-1px;
    text-shadow:0 0 60px var(--green-glow), 0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    animation:fadeUp .9s .18s ease both;
  }

  .erlc-badge {
    margin-top:12px;
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:7px;
    background:rgba(58,223,106,0.1);
    border:1px solid rgba(58,223,106,0.35); border-radius:50px;
    padding:6px 16px; font-size:12px; font-weight:700;
    color:var(--green); letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase;
    animation:fadeUp .9s .24s ease both;
  }
  .erlc-badge span {
    width:7px; height:7px; background:var(--green); border-radius:50%;
    display:inline-block; box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--green);
  }

  .hero-actions { margin-top:26px; animation:fadeUp .9s .3s ease both; }

  .btn-discord {
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--green-dark),var(--green));
    color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:50px;
    padding:15px 36px; font-size:15px; font-weight:700;
    font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif; letter-spacing:1.5px;
    text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer;
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    box-shadow:0 4px 28px var(--green-glow);
    transition:transform .2s, box-shadow .2s; text-decoration:none;
  }
  .btn-discord:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(58,223,106,0.65); }
  .btn-discord svg { width:20px; height:20px; fill:#fff; }

  .stats {
    display:flex; gap:clamp(36px,7vw,90px);
    margin-top:50px; animation:fadeUp .9s .4s ease both;
  }
  .stat {
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:5px;
    text-decoration:none; transition:transform .2s; cursor:pointer;
  }
  .stat:hover { transform:translateY(-3px); }
  .stat:hover .stat-num { color:var(--green); text-shadow:0 0 20px var(--green-glow); }
  .stat-num {
    font-family:"Oswald",sans-serif;
    font-size:clamp(34px,5vw,54px); font-weight:700;
    color:#fff; line-height:1; transition:color .2s,text-shadow .2s;
  }
  .stat-label {
    font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px;
    text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }

  .scroll-dot {
    position:absolute; bottom:24px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%);
    width:6px; height:6px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.35); border-radius:50%;
    animation:blink 2s ease-in-out infinite; z-index:4;
  }
  @keyframes blink { 0%,100%{opacity:.2} 50%{opacity:1} }

  /* ── DEPARTMENTS ── */
  .depts-section {
    background:rgba(58,223,106,0.02);
    border-top:1px solid rgba(58,223,106,0.08);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(58,223,106,0.08);
    padding:90px 20px;
  }
  .depts-inner { max-width:1020px; margin:0 auto; }
  .depts-header { text-align:center; margin-bottom:50px; }
  .section-tag {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:7px;
    background:rgba(58,223,106,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(58,223,106,0.3);
    border-radius:50px; padding:6px 14px; font-size:12px; font-weight:700;
    color:var(--green); letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family:"Oswald",sans-serif;
    font-size:clamp(34px,5vw,54px); font-weight:800; line-height:1.05; margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .section-title span { color:var(--green); }
  .section-body {
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-size:15px; line-height:1.8;
    max-width:480px; margin:0 auto;
  }

  .depts-grid {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 18px;
  }
  .depts-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 18px;
  }
  .depts-row .dept-card {
    flex: 1 1 0;
    max-width: 320px;
    min-width: 0;
  }
  .dept-card {
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    border:1px solid rgba(58,223,106,0.12);
    border-radius:18px; padding:30px 20px 26px;
    text-align:center;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:0;
    transition:transform .25s, border-color .25s, box-shadow .25s;
  }
  .dept-card:hover {
    transform:translateY(-5px);
    border-color:rgba(58,223,106,0.45);
    box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(58,223,106,0.12);
  }
  .dept-logo {
    width:80px; height:80px; object-fit:contain;
    margin-bottom:14px;
    filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5));
  }
  .dept-name {
    font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;
    font-size:17px; font-weight:800; color:#fff;
    letter-spacing:.5px; margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .dept-desc { font-size:13px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); line-height:1.5; }



  /* ── CTA ── */
  .cta-section { padding:90px 20px; text-align:center; }
  .cta-box {
    max-width:600px; margin:0 auto;
    background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 0%, rgba(58,223,106,0.13) 0%, transparent 70%);
    border:1px solid rgba(58,223,106,0.2); border-radius:24px;
    padding:54px 34px; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .cta-box::before {
    content:""; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:1px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--green),transparent);
  }
  .cta-box h2 {
    font-family:"Oswald",sans-serif;
    font-size:clamp(28px,5vw,46px); font-weight:800; margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .cta-box h2 span { color:var(--green); }
  .cta-box p {
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45); font-size:15px; line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:26px;
  }

  footer {
    border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    padding:28px 20px; text-align:center;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25); font-size:13px;
  }
  footer a { color:var(--green); text-decoration:none; }

  @media(max-width:720px) {
    .depts-row .dept-card { max-width: none; }
    .palm-wrap img { width:180px; }
  }
    .depts-last-row .dept-card { width:calc(50% - 9px); }
    .palm-wrap img { width:180px; }
  }
  @media(max-width:480px) {
    .depts-row { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
    .depts-row .dept-card { max-width: none; }
    .palm-wrap img { width:110px; }
  }
    .depts-last-row { flex-direction:column; }
    .depts-last-row .dept-card { width:100%; }
    .palm-wrap img { width:120px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav class="nav">
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C8.13 2 5 5.13 5 9c0 5.25 7 13 7 13s7-7.75 7-13c0-3.87-3.13-7-7-7zm0 9.5c-1.38 0-2.5-1.12-2.5-2.5s1.12-2.5 2.5-2.5 2.5 1.12 2.5 2.5-1.12 2.5-2.5 2.5z"/></svg>
    CASRPX
  </a>
  <a href="https://discord.gg/casrpx" target="_blank" class="nav-btn">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.317 4.37a19.791 19.791 0 0 0-4.885-1.515.074.074 0 0 0-.079.037c-.21.375-.444.864-.608 1.25a18.27 18.27 0 0 0-5.487 0 12.64 12.64 0 0 0-.617-1.25.077.077 0 0 0-.079-.037A19.736 19.736 0 0 0 3.677 4.37a.07.07 0 0 0-.032.027C.533 9.046-.32 13.58.099 18.057.1 18.08.113 18.1.131 18.11a19.9 19.9 0 0 0 5.993 3.03.078.078 0 0 0 .084-.028 14.09 14.09 0 0 0 1.226-1.994.076.076 0 0 0-.041-.106 13.107 13.107 0 0 1-1.872-.892.077.077 0 0 1-.008-.128 10.2 10.2 0 0 0 .372-.292.074.074 0 0 1 .077-.01c3.928 1.793 8.18 1.793 12.062 0a.074.074 0 0 1 .078.01c.12.098.246.198.373.292a.077.077 0 0 1-.006.127 12.299 12.299 0 0 1-1.873.892.077.077 0 0 0-.041.107c.36.698.772 1.362 1.225 1.993a.076.076 0 0 0 .084.028 19.839 19.839 0 0 0 6.002-3.03.077.077 0 0 0 .032-.054c.5-5.177-.838-9.674-3.549-13.66a.061.061 0 0 0-.031-.03zM8.02 15.33c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.956-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.956 2.418-2.157 2.418zm7.975 0c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.955-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.946 2.418-2.157 2.418z"/></svg>
    JOIN SERVER
  </a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-logo-bg"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""></div>
  <div class="particles" id="particles"></div>

  <div class="palm-wrap left">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  </div>
  <div class="palm-wrap right">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  </div>

  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-title-line1">CALIFORNIA</div>
    <div class="hero-title-line2">STATE</div>
    <div class="erlc-badge"><span></span>ERLC Roblox Server</div>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="https://discord.gg/casrpx" target="_blank" class="btn-discord">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.317 4.37a19.791 19.791 0 0 0-4.885-1.515.074.074 0 0 0-.079.037c-.21.375-.444.864-.608 1.25a18.27 18.27 0 0 0-5.487 0 12.64 12.64 0 0 0-.617-1.25.077.077 0 0 0-.079-.037A19.736 19.736 0 0 0 3.677 4.37a.07.07 0 0 0-.032.027C.533 9.046-.32 13.58.099 18.057.1 18.08.113 18.1.131 18.11a19.9 19.9 0 0 0 5.993 3.03.078.078 0 0 0 .084-.028 14.09 14.09 0 0 0 1.226-1.994.076.076 0 0 0-.041-.106 13.107 13.107 0 0 1-1.872-.892.077.077 0 0 1-.008-.128 10.2 10.2 0 0 0 .372-.292.074.074 0 0 1 .077-.01c3.928 1.793 8.18 1.793 12.062 0a.074.074 0 0 1 .078.01c.12.098.246.198.373.292a.077.077 0 0 1-.006.127 12.299 12.299 0 0 1-1.873.892.077.077 0 0 0-.041.107c.36.698.772 1.362 1.225 1.993a.076.076 0 0 0 .084.028 19.839 19.839 0 0 0 6.002-3.03.077.077 0 0 0 .032-.054c.5-5.177-.838-9.674-3.549-13.66a.061.061 0 0 0-.031-.03zM8.02 15.33c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.956-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.956 2.418-2.157 2.418zm7.975 0c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.955-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.946 2.418-2.157 2.418z"/></svg>
        JOIN DISCORD
      </a>
    </div>
    </div>
  <div class="scroll-dot"></div>
</section>

<!-- DEPARTMENTS -->
<section class="depts-section">
  <div class="depts-inner">
    <div class="depts-header">
      <div class="section-tag">
        <svg width="8" height="8" viewBox="0 0 8 8" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="4"/></svg>
        Departments
      </div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Our <span>6 Departments</span></h2>
      <p class="section-body">Professionally structured with dedicated leadership, training programs, and custom loadouts.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="depts-grid">
      <div class="depts-row">
        <div class="dept-card">
        <img class="dept-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="LAPD">
        <div class="dept-name">Los Angeles PD</div>
        <div class="dept-desc">Primary law enforcement protecting the streets of Los Santos.</div>
      </div>
        <div class="dept-card">
        <img class="dept-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="LAFD">
        <div class="dept-name">LA Fire Department</div>
        <div class="dept-desc">Emergency fire and rescue services across the city.</div>
      </div>
        <div class="dept-card">
        <img class="dept-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="LASD">
        <div class="dept-name">LA Sheriff's Dept.</div>
        <div class="dept-desc">County-level law enforcement with wide jurisdiction.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="depts-row">
        <div class="dept-card">
          <img class="dept-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="CHP">
          <div class="dept-name">CA Highway Patrol</div>
          <div class="dept-desc">Patrolling California's highways and interstates.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dept-card">
          <img class="dept-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Caltrans">
          <div class="dept-name">Caltrans</div>
          <div class="dept-desc">Transportation infrastructure and civilian operations.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->
<section class="cta-section">
  <div class="cta-box">
    <h2>Ready to <span>Join?</span></h2>
    <p>Join California State Roleplay on ERLC Roblox. Click below to hop in our Discord and get whitelisted today.</p>
    <a href="https://discord.gg/casrpx" target="_blank" class="btn-discord">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.317 4.37a19.791 19.791 0 0 0-4.885-1.515.074.074 0 0 0-.079.037c-.21.375-.444.864-.608 1.25a18.27 18.27 0 0 0-5.487 0 12.64 12.64 0 0 0-.617-1.25.077.077 0 0 0-.079-.037A19.736 19.736 0 0 0 3.677 4.37a.07.07 0 0 0-.032.027C.533 9.046-.32 13.58.099 18.057.1 18.08.113 18.1.131 18.11a19.9 19.9 0 0 0 5.993 3.03.078.078 0 0 0 .084-.028 14.09 14.09 0 0 0 1.226-1.994.076.076 0 0 0-.041-.106 13.107 13.107 0 0 1-1.872-.892.077.077 0 0 1-.008-.128 10.2 10.2 0 0 0 .372-.292.074.074 0 0 1 .077-.01c3.928 1.793 8.18 1.793 12.062 0a.074.074 0 0 1 .078.01c.12.098.246.198.373.292a.077.077 0 0 1-.006.127 12.299 12.299 0 0 1-1.873.892.077.077 0 0 0-.041.107c.36.698.772 1.362 1.225 1.993a.076.076 0 0 0 .084.028 19.839 19.839 0 0 0 6.002-3.03.077.077 0 0 0 .032-.054c.5-5.177-.838-9.674-3.549-13.66a.061.061 0 0 0-.031-.03zM8.02 15.33c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.956-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.956 2.418-2.157 2.418zm7.975 0c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.955-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.946 2.418-2.157 2.418z"/></svg>
      discord.gg/casrpx
    </a>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  © 2025 <span style="color:var(--green)">California State Roleplay</span> &nbsp;·&nbsp; ERLC Roblox Server &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  <a href="https://discord.gg/casrpx" target="_blank">discord.gg/casrpx</a>
</footer>

<script>
  const c = document.getElementById("particles");
  for (let i = 0; i < 35; i++) {
    const p = document.createElement("div");
    p.className = "particle";
    const s = 1 + Math.random()*3;
    p.style.cssText = `left:${Math.random()*100}%;--dur:${5+Math.random()*12}s;--delay:${Math.random()*12}s;width:${s}px;height:${s}px;`;
    c.appendChild(p);
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
